description: Scans company press releases for fresh contract/order/supply wins, parses deal size, cross-references revenue to flag un-recognized forward revenue. Small-cap weighted (one contract is transformative). v2: full-market all sectors/caps, 3x/day, graded deal-win signals.

schedule.description: Full-market deal-win scan 3x/day (13:30 pre-open PR dump, 17:30 midday, 22:00 close)
